name: learnflow-minimax-m3
description: Recursive subject learning web app powered by MiniMax M3, with selectable trees and print-friendly HTML reports.

scripts.check: node --check server/index.mjs && node --check server/minimax.mjs && node --check api/explore.mjs && node --check api/analyze.mjs && node --check api/health.mjs && node --check src/app.js && node --check src/tree.js && node --check src/report.js && node --check scripts/build.mjs
